name: Booking DataFormat Fixes - Backward Compatibility
description: Fix all data format issues reported after booking AWS SDK v2 upgrade: MetaData timestamp DateTimeParseException, boolean deserialization, OffsetDateTime parse errors in Audit/RapidReservation. Ensure backward compatibility for visibility and other modules using pre-upgrade booking model 2.1.8.M. Related to previous session ad378beb151a432f.

entries.summary: Complete analysis of all 4 reported issues - root causes identified and fix plan defined
entries.detail:
## Root Causes:

### Issue 1&2 (MetaData timestamp): 
@JsonFormat(pattern="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SS") on MetaData.timestamp controls both ser/deser.
- NEW records: space separator, OLD records: T separator
- Jackson uses @JsonFormat pattern for deser, fails on old records with T at index 10
- Fix: @JsonFormat(shape=STRING) + @JsonDeserialize(using=FlexibleLocalDateTimeDeserializer.class)

### Issue 3 (boolean displayFlag):
ContainerType.displayFlag is boolean primitive. Old DynamoDB data has N("1") instead of BOOL(true).
LegacyMapConverter.toSimpleValue() returns "1" (String) for N type.
Jackson rejects String "1" → boolean.
Fix: Change LegacyMapConverter to return actual Java numbers for N type.

### Issue 4 (Audit OffsetDateTime):
@JsonFormat(pattern="yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ") expects 3 frac digits.
Old data has 6 digits: "2020-11-30T04:23:30.153845Z"
Also SSSZ pattern produces +0000 (no colon) which ISO parser can't read.
Fix: Change to SSSXXX pattern + @JsonDeserialize(using=OffsetDateTimeTypeConverter.class)

### Deprecated deps: Already removed (dynamo-client, email-sender)

### Booking model 2.1.8.M:
- Pre-upgrade version, published via booking-model Maven profile
- Consumers: visibility-commons, visibility-matcher, watermill-booking, pi-statusevents-out-processor
- Current post-upgrade has NOT published new model version
- Section 4.1 compile-time breaks are INVALID (visibility uses pre-upgrade model)
- Section 4.4/5 runtime breaks from DynamoDB key annotations are INVALID for same reason

entries.summary: All booking tests pass: 971 unit tests + 138 DynamoDB integration tests, 0 failures
entries.detail:
Command: mvn clean verify -pl booking -am

Surefire (unit tests - JUnit5): 971 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors
Surefire (unit tests - TestNG): ~913 tests, 0 failures
Failsafe (DynamoDB IT - JUnit5): 138 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors
Failsafe (Flow/Service IT - TestNG): 151 skipped (expected - requires full app startup config)

Key results:
- BookingDetailDaoIT.ConverterRoundTripTests: 6 tests PASS
- RapidReservationDaoIT: 15 tests PASS (including ConverterRoundTrip)
- All converter tests (MetaData, Audit, EnrichedAttributes, LegacyMapConverter, FlexibleLocalDateTimeDeserializer): PASS

All data format fixes verified through DynamoDB Local round-trip tests.
